species: To address this issue, we successfully ablated KCTD7 expression by CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing in HeLa cells...
tissue: HeLa cells are derived from cervical tissue
cell_type: Neuronal ceroid lipofuscinoses (NCLs) are a group of the most common neurodegenerative lysosomal storage disorders characterized by intracellular accumulation of ceroid in neurons.
disease_state: Disruption of KCTD7-regulated CLN5 proteolysis leads to neuronal ceroid lipofuscinoses, type 14.
sample_source: However, patient-derived KCTD7 mutations disrupt the interaction between KCTD7-CUL3 or KCTD7-CLN5...
cell_line: To address this issue, we successfully ablated KCTD7 expression by CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing in HeLa cells...
